items.label: Johto-only challenge: team ≤ Lv 47
items.note: For 'Poor, Washed-Up Mermaid' — defeat Misty in Set battle style, using only Johto Pokémon that never exceed Lv 47 in battle, and without using any Pack items.

items.label: Recommended counter
items.note: If over the cap, use the Legendary Beasts or a caught Skarmory; a Lv 40 Lanturn from a Super Rod also destroys Misty.
